name: 撕毀/踩踏佈置物
description: 男主命令下屬拆掉女主辛苦佈置的裝飾品並踩踏，展示權力碾壓。這個行為直接否定了女主的勞動成果，激發觀眾同情心和憤怒。
tags: 精心佈置的物品被暴力拆除踩踏，視覺上的破壞感強烈

examples.drama_title: On her first day, the cleaning girl defied the CEO, expecting to be fired—but he proposed to her!
examples.excerpt: Take all of this down now. / Step on everything that's on the floor. / I just finished setting all this up. How dare you mess up all my hard work after an entire afternoon.
examples.context: 精心佈置的物品被暴力拆除踩踏，視覺上的破壞感強烈
